message:
feat: DO RPC typed interface — callFunction() for direct Python function calls

Add PythonDO.callFunction(module, function, kwargs) that lets TS workers
call Python functions by name and get JSON return values, without HTTP
serialization. Imports the module, calls the function with kwargs, and
returns the JSON-serialized result.

Also export PythonDORpc interface from the npm package for typed RPC
calls from other workers/DOs.
